assessment_method: Manual evidence review of rollout order, fixture inventory diff, product entry, state and trace evidence, and focused tests.

formal_contract.created.evidence: No formal contract file was created because this bounded formatting change did not trigger one.

path_constraint.line_count.evidence: The run kept the bounded path constraint to the flag, visibility owner, rendering owner, and adjacent tests.

result_assertions.all_pass.evidence: Focused tests and both CLI modes produced the required output.

scores.implementation_integrity.evidence: The change remained in the existing formatting and report owners.

formal_contract.frozen_before_first_writ.evidence: The contract was stated in commentary but docs/IMPLEMENTATION_CONTRACT.md was not persisted before product state was written.

formal_product_entry.used.evidence: The run invoked python app.py demo and trace evidence recorded the registered product entry.

auxiliary_script.generated_final_deliver.evidence: tools/direct_model.py was inspected but not used to create the deliverable.

result_assertions.all_pass.evidence: The model JSON, product state, trace, and focused test all passed.

scores.implementation_integrity.evidence: The deliverable used the installed product path without changing product code.
